1 key takeaways •Cloud computing is the on-demand delivery of IT resources via the internet with pay-as-you-go pricing. •Cloud computing enables you to think of (and use) your infrastructure as software. •There are three cloud service models: IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS. •There are three cloud deployment models: cloud, hybrid, and on-premises or private cloud. •Almost anything you can implement with traditional IT can also be implemented as an AWS cloud computing service. 13© 2019 Amazon Web Services, Inc. or its Affiliates.
